hooks.command: python3 -c "import subprocess,json; r=subprocess.run(['bash','/workspaces/rgb-sunglasses/.devcontainer/scripts/check-hardware.sh'],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=30); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'SessionStart','additionalContext':'Hardware status (checked automatically at session start):\n\n'+r.stdout.strip()}}))"
